mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_ip_block_batch (batch_code, batch_name, source_type, source_name, rule_action, default_priority, active, memo, created_by) VALUES (#{batchCode}, #{batchName}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceName}, #{ruleAction}, #{defaultPriority}, #{active}, #{memo}, #{createdBy})
mapper.select: SELECT id, batch_code, batch_name, source_type, source_name, rule_action, default_priority, active, total_rule_count, active_rule_count, memo, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at FROM admin_ip_block_batch WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_security_block_rule (rule_type, rule_value, scope, action_type, category, priority, control_mode, batch_id, reason, active, is_effective_active, waf_sync_enabled, waf_sync_status, created_by) VALUES (#{ruleType}, #{ruleValue}, 'GLOBAL', #{actionType}, #{category}, #{priority}, 'BATCH', #{batchId}, #{reason}, 1, 1, 0, 'SKIPPED', #{createdBy})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM admin_security_block_rule WHERE rule_type = #{ruleType} AND rule_value = #{ruleValue}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM admin_security_block_rule WHERE batch_id = #{batchId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM admin_security_block_rule WHERE batch_id = #{batchId} AND active = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_ip_block_batch_operation (batch_id, operation_type, operation_option, requested_rule_count, affected_rule_count, actor_user_id, memo) VALUES (#{batchId}, #{operationType}, #{operationOption}, #{requested}, #{affected}, #{actorUserId}, #{memo})
